guest__recording__too_short: That was too short — try again?
guest__recording__mic_permission: We need access to your microphone
guest__recording__mic_denied: Microphone access was denied. Please enable it in your browser settings.
guest__thank_you__message: Your message has been sent to {names}
guest__landing__caption: Voice, video, photo or a quick note. Your message goes straight to the couple — no other guests will see it.
guest__landing__closed_limit: The couple have hit their message limit — but thank you for showing up.
guest__landing__closed_not_open: Messages are not open yet. Check back soon.
guest__landing__closed_other: Messages aren't accepting submissions right now.
guest__thank_you__body: They'll hear it soon — sometimes when they need it most. Your words have made the keepsake just a little more real.
guest__thank_you__caption: Your contribution stays private to the couple. We never share guest messages with third parties.
guest__record__subtitle: Mix and match: add a voice note, a video, a photo, a written line — any combination works.
guest__record__name_placeholder: So they know who it's from
guest__record__error_default: Something went wrong. Please try again.
guest__record__error_too_large: Your file is too large. Try a shorter recording or fewer photos.
guest__record__error_unsupported_format: That media format isn't supported by your browser. Try recording again.
guest__record__error_rate_limited: You've sent too many messages. Please wait a moment and try again.
guest__record__error_validation: Something in your submission was rejected. Please review and try again.
guest__record__error_network_retry: Network trouble. We tried to recover but couldn't finish. Check your connection and retry.
guest__record__caption: Goes straight to the couple. Other guests won't see it.
guest__record__audio__hint: Up to {seconds} seconds. Speak naturally — you're talking to the couple.
guest__record__audio__permission_hint: We'll ask for microphone permission once.
guest__record__audio__error_no_support: This browser doesn't support audio recording.
guest__record__audio__error_denied: Microphone access denied. Enable it in your browser settings.
guest__record__audio__error_insecure: Microphone requires HTTPS. Open this page over https:// or localhost.
guest__record__audio__error_not_found: No microphone detected. Plug one in and retry.
guest__record__audio__error_in_use: Microphone is busy in another app or tab.
guest__record__video__caption: Up to {seconds} seconds. Front camera by default.
guest__record__video__error_no_support: This browser doesn't support video recording.
guest__record__video__error_denied: Camera or mic access denied. Enable it in your browser settings.
guest__record__video__error_insecure: Camera requires HTTPS. Open this page over https:// or localhost.
guest__record__video__error_not_found: No camera detected. Connect one and retry.
guest__record__video__error_in_use: Camera is busy in another app or tab.
guest__record__photo__caption: Pick a photo from your phone or camera roll to send along with your message.
guest__record__photo__error_too_large: Photos must be 25 MB or smaller.
guest__record__note__placeholder: Write a short note for the couple…
guest__landing__step_send_subtitle: No app, no sign-up. Just go.
guest__landing__trust_note: Your message goes straight to the couple. Only they can hear it.
guest__landing__cta_caption: Just a browser tab — no app to download.
guest__compose__subtitle: Add anything that feels right — voice, video, or a written note.
guest__compose__error_missing_content: Add at least one: voice, video, photo, or written note before continuing.
guest__compose__photo_subtitle: Add a photo from your camera or library.
guest__compose__photo_max_reached: You can attach up to {max} photos.
guest__record__photo__error_no_support: Camera not supported on this device.
guest__photo__subtitle: Optional — skip if you'd rather not.
guest__photo__caption: Pick a photo from your phone or take one now.
guest__review__subtitle: Take a quick look. When you're ready, we'll send it straight to the couple.
guest__review__error_missing_name: Please enter your name before sending.
guest__review__error_missing_content: Add at least one of: voice, video, photo, or written note before sending.
guest__review__error_turnstile: Please complete the verification challenge before sending.
guest_gallery__count: {count, plural, =0 {No memories yet} one {# memory} other {# memories}}
guest_gallery__empty_body: Photos and videos will appear here once they are added to the event.
guest_gallery__unavailable_body: This gallery link is no longer active. Ask the couple for an updated link.
guest_invitation__intro: {partnerA} and {partnerB} would love your blessing in voice or video — to keep forever.
guest_invitation__cta_caption: Voice, video, photo or a quick note. Goes straight to the couple.
guest_invitation__closed_limit: Messages are at capacity — but thank you for showing up.
guest_invitation__closed_not_open: Messages aren't open yet. Check back soon.
guest_invitation__closed_other: Messages aren't accepting submissions right now.
